title: Spicy Ethiopian Pilaf with Tomato
description: A flavorful and spicy one-pot dish inspired by Ethiopian cuisine, combining pilaf with dense tomatoes and a kick of flavor.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the pilaf and cook for 2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the diced tomatoes and cook for 3-4 minutes, until they start to break down.
Add the Ethiopian spice mix and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-12 minutes, until the pilaf is tender and the flavors have melded together.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
